pi_items.source: Found in task instruction, setup_task.sh (deletes .Tickets-Created), and export_result.sh/verifier.py (checks for .Tickets-Created folder).
Found in task instruction ('3 most recent emails') and verifier.py (target_count = 3).
Found strictly matching in verifier.py where these three exact strings are checked within email bodies.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 50 real emails from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus. The workflow requires moving the 3 most recent emails to a new folder named 'Tickets-Created', which corresponds to the Maildir folder '.Tickets-Created'. The verifier strictly checks that exactly 3 replies are sent and that their bodies contain the exact strings 'automated acknowledgment', 'review your inquiry shortly', and 'Reference Ticket ID:'. It also scores whether unique numerical IDs were provided and whether the original sender's name was personalized in the reply.
